---
title: "Corporate Entity Resolution Engine (CORE)"
page-layout: full
---

# Corporate Entity Resolution Engine (CORE)

## Transparent. Reviewable. Reproducible. Cumulative.

CORE is an open research software framework designed to support transparent, reviewable, reproducible, and cumulative entity resolution in empirical research.

Rather than treating entity resolution as a disposable data-cleaning task, CORE treats entity resolution as a scientific process in which computational methods, expert judgement, and validated knowledge work together to produce trustworthy analytical datasets.

## Core Principles

- Transparency
- Reproducibility
- Reviewability
- Knowledge Preservation

## Framework Components

- Entity Resolution Engine
- Review Queue
- Learning Layer
- Scientific Workflow
- Research Software Infrastructure

## Documentation

The current documentation includes:

- Philosophy
- Architecture
- Workflow
- Review Queue
- Learning Layer
- Methodology

## Source Code

GitHub Repository:

https://github.com/yrtsv/CORE
